calendar.matters:
Petitiion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-29-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Michael H. Roush, Esq. 925/931-5015, Antonio Rosssmann, Esq. & Roger B. Moore, Esq. & 861-1401 for petitioner City of Pleasanton; Brian E. Washington, Esq. 510/272-6700 for petitioner Alameda County Flood Control and Water Conservation District, Zone 7; Mark W. Poole, Deputy Atty General 703-5582 for respondents State Water Resources Control Board, Regional Water Quality Control Board, San Francisco Bay Region, and Lawrence P. Kolb; Steven Saxton, Esq. 916/441-0131 for Real Party in Interest Dublin San Ramon Services District; Tamara Galanter, 552-7272 for Real Party in Interest City of Livermore.
RULING: Argued and each to submit proposed orders with three page letters on 04/02/02 5pm, at which time the Court will take the matter under submission.
